prompt: Map Salesforce integrations for Order-to-Cash: Salesforce to SAP S/4HANA, Stripe, Avalara, and Snowflake. Distinguish synchronous APIs vs async events.
assertions: Diagram includes Salesforce, SAP S/4HANA, Stripe, Avalara, and Snowflake.
Connectors distinguish synchronous vs asynchronous communication styles.
Legend or explicit labeling explains sync vs async semantics.
Integration boundaries or zones are visually clear.
Order-to-Cash data movement is represented end-to-end.
